nursery_water.description: If watering is enabled, and it's been longer than a cycle length since water was called for, call for water.

cultivation_water.description: If watering is enabled, and it's been longer than a cycle length since water was called for, call for water.

cultivation_water_24hr.description: If watering is enabled, and it's been longer than a cycle length since water was called for, call for water.

cultivation_right_water_solo.description: If watering is enabled, and it's been longer than a cycle length since the grow wall irrigated, irrigate the wall.

cultivation_right_water_combined.description: If watering is enabled, and it's been longer than a cycle length since the grow wall irrigated (and longer than an offset since the other wall irrigated), irrigate the wall.
